one of those rare times I don't use exposition. straight to the point.

don't feel like spoiling the plot. plot? what plot.

UPDATE: 3/19/26 Intro 1 Gender neutral, Intro 2 FemPov, Intro 3 MalePov.

guys I've been dying to do a bot like this forever. I have shameless enjoyment of Bunny x Wolf demi bots, and this was meant to be a lot darker (dead dove shit). it wasn't anything noncon but like... i don't wanna spoil it cause I am 100% doing an alt on Wolf Gallagher and Bunny user. a few maybe.

extra tags because I ran out of spots: age gap (legal!!), size difference, knotting🤨

update: 3/19/26, after finally returning im updating all my old ANY POV bots. for smut im going to experiment with two intros: not much will change besides anatomy and pronouns, so its less gender neutral. but i will keep the original intro for those who are gender neutral themselves and wanna pick out what anatomy they're using. im hoping this makes it more accessible to all genders ^_^

stay 𝒻𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓀𝓎 fellas.
